thesis: They will structure their businesses and their data around agent attention.
audience: Audience: people using AI in real work, not just talking about it.
whyItMatters: Push to see if you can find what agent readability and writability they have.
supportPoints: The companies that are going to win in this world are going to think about agent attention first.

I want you to start to benchmark.

thesis: One wrong path is oh it will be agent readable writable
audience: Audience: people using AI in real work, not just talking about it.
whyItMatters: it's easy to say it's going to be agent readable writable and then take the wrong path.
supportPoints: These are wrong ideas about how the agent readable writable future is going to work and I want to be clear about why they're wrong and what we need to do instead
